name: Cala Blanca
description: A built-up cove of some 50 metres of very white, fine sand, with every amenity and close to Ciutadella. Practical for staying and bathing without long drives, though without the untouched nature of the eastern coves.

highlights: fine white sand with full services, a short hop from Ciutadella
shallow, calm waters, comfortable for families
direct access by car: a good base to stay near the water
